title: Clarification on limitation period under Section 73 of CGST Act
text: The limitation period for issuing demand notices under Section 73 of the CGST Act, 2017 is three years from the due date of filing the annual return for the relevant financial year. The due date for filing annual return (GSTR-9) is December 31st of the year following the financial year. For example, for FY 2017-18, the due date of annual return is December 31, 2018, and the limitation period expires on December 31, 2021. Any show cause notice issued after this date shall be considered time-barred and invalid.
